name: Ubuntu + Bun
postCreateCommand: apt update && apt upgrade -y && bun upgrade && ln -sf /usr/share/zoneinfo/Africa/Nairobi /etc/localtime && curl -fsSL https://cli.coderabbit.ai/install.sh | sh && mkdir -p scripts && curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iamvikshan/atlas/main/scripts/bootstrap.sh > scripts/bootstrap.sh && chmod +x scripts/bootstrap.sh && scripts/bootstrap.sh --default
